title: 65-lesson milestone
text: 65 lessons. You can write a school essay faster than you can think it. That's a real skill. The remaining 10 lessons polish what you have, and then you'll face the final tournament-style exam at lesson 75.
tips: 90 WPM = top 5% globally for any age
Ten lessons to teen course final

character_tips.anna: 🎯 90 WPM. Top 5% in the world. Ten lessons to the final tournament.
character_tips.maxim: 65 in. Final stretch. Hold the gain.
character_tips.klavochka: Ten steps to the throne, my hero 👑
